# server-query

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: Generic FilterGroup/SortRule → SQL compiler + null-aware keyset (cursor) seek for server-delegated data-view sources. Field-type agnostic: operator SQL is supplied by an injected resolver, so this owns drizzle and the seek correctness, not any field type.
- Cross-plugin:
  - Imported by: `conversations/all-conversations`
- Server:
  - DB schema: `plugins/primitives/plugins/data-view/plugins/server-query/server/internal/compile.test.ts`
  - Exports: Types: `ColumnBinding`, `FieldColumnMap`, `OperatorSqlBuilder`, `OperatorSqlResolver`, `SortKey`, `Tiebreaker`; Values: `buildSortKeys`, `compileWhere`, `keyValuesOf`, `orderByClauses`, `seekPredicate`
- Core:
  - Exports: Types: `CursorPayload`; Values: `decodeCursor`, `encodeCursor`, `sortSignature`

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:END -->
